---
title: "Baseball Props Dashboard"
toc: false
---

## Purpose

This site will be a daily MLB prediction research dashboard built in R and Quarto. It will compare modeled probabilities with available sportsbook lines, surface only recommendations that clear defined confidence thresholds, and preserve an honest record of every recommendation.

## Initial Scope

- Pitcher strikeout props
- Batter total bases props
- NRFI (no run first inning)
- Daily price snapshots and pick tracking
- Model performance and data-health reporting

The site is currently in setup mode. Model output and live lines will appear only after the data provider and scoring pipeline have been validated.

## Approach

Recommendations will be evaluated against the line captured at prediction time. Performance will emphasize chronological validation, probability calibration, accuracy by market, and a complete record of issued recommendations.
